Account.Name: Operating Checking

Account.Description: Set aside for quarterly taxes and payroll funding

Account.Description: Exams, cleanings, and treatment billed to patient families

Account.Description: Co-pay and claim reimbursements from dental insurers

Account.Description: Watercolor class tuition and commission income

Account.Description: Toothbrushes, fluoride rinse, and retail dental products

Account.Description: Monthly suite rent - Michigan Ave office landlord

Account.Description: Electric, water, and gas - DTE Energy and city

Account.Name: Insurance Expense
Account.Description: Malpractice and general liability - quarterly

Account.Name: Payroll Expense
Account.Description: Staff wages - hygienists, assistant, front desk

Account.Name: Dental Supplies
Account.Description: Clinical supplies from Henry Schein, Patterson, Benco

Account.Name: Equipment Repair & Maintenance
Account.Description: Chair, compressor, and sterilizer servicing

Account.Name: Meals & Staff Events
Account.Description: Team lunches and staff appreciation

Account.Name: Marketing & Advertising
Account.Description: Website, social media, and community outreach

Account.Name: Patient Co-pay Income
Account.Description: Patient co-payments collected at time of visit

Account.Name: Other Practice Income
Account.Description: Records fees, forms, and other miscellaneous practice income

Account.Name: Commission Income
Account.Description: Watercolor portrait and mural commission payments

Account.Name: Practice Savings
Account.Description: Reserve funds for practice operations and growth

Account.Name: Software & Subscriptions
Account.Description: Practice management software and online subscriptions

Account.Name: Equipment Rental
Account.Description: Leased dental equipment and short-term rentals

Account.Name: Lab Fees
Account.Description: Outside dental lab crown and appliance charges

Account.Name: Patient Outreach Expense
Account.Description: Recall postcards, screening flyers, and family outreach

Account.Description: Team celebrations and staff appreciation meals
